query: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.status, t.assignedTo, t.assignedBy, u1.name as assignedToName, u1.email as assignedToEmail, u2.name as assignedByName FROM tasks t LEFT JOIN users u1 ON u1.id = t.assignedTo LEFT JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = t.assignedBy ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT t.id, t.title, t.status, t.assignedTo, t.assignedBy, u1.name as assignedToName, u1.email as assignedToEmail, u2.name as assignedByName FROM tasks t LEFT JOIN users u1 ON u1.id = t.assignedTo LEFT JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = t.assignedBy ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 5;
